electroacoustic.components: Passive 2-way coaxial: LF 1x 8" cone driver + HF 1x 1.5" neodymium diaphragm compression driver, coaxially mounted; bass-reflex acoustical load with L-Vents laminar ports and conical waveguide
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 129 dB peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, [X8] preset

operating_modes: Single PA channel (passive 2-way, one amplifier output per enclosure)
amplification.preset_note: [X8] is the short-throw/PA reference preset; [X8_MO] is the stage-monitor preset; a low-latency monitor variant cuts latency from 3.84 ms to ~0.84-1.18 ms. SB15_100 presets are for the paired SB15m subwoofer.

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), interchangeable IN/LINK; internal pinout uses points 1+/1- only (2+/2- not linked)
connection.breakouts: SP-Y1 (4-point speakON to 2x 2-point speakON) for two passive enclosures; DOSUB-LA8 (8-point PA-COM to 4x 2-point speakON) for four passive enclosures

physical.dimensions_mm: 424 (H) x 264 (W front) x 306 (D), with 250 mm rear width and 278 mm tapered depth
physical.cabinet: Premium grade Baltic beech and birch plywood; coated steel grill with acoustically neutral 3D fabric
physical.finish: Dark grey brown Pantone 426C, or pure white RAL 9010, or custom RAL on special order

modes: Pole-mounted (35 mm integrated pole socket in handle)
Stage floor monitor (35 degree wedge angle vs vertical)
rigging_accessories: X-UTILT (tilt-adjust wall-mount bracket for X series)
X-BAR (rigging bar for one enclosure, ~10 angulations)
deployment.rigging_note: Single-enclosure rigging only; flown deployments use X-US8/X-UL8 or X-BAR. M8 DIN580 insert provides secondary safety. Front logo can be rotated for any orientation.

usage: Coaxial point-source intended primarily as a high-SPL stage monitor; the [X8_MO] preset and 35 degree wedge angle make it usable as a low-profile floor wedge at FOH or in control rooms.
Each X8 needs only one amplifier channel since it is a passive 2-way design - budget up to 12 per LA12X, 8 per LA4X, or 16 per LA7.16i when planning channel counts.
Pair one X8 with one SB15m subwoofer (1:1 ratio) using the [SB15_100] preset to extend low-frequency reach below the X8's 60 Hz limit.
Its 100 degree axisymmetric (conical) directivity gives wide, even coverage with no minimum listening distance, suiting front-fill, under-balcony fill, and discreet install fills.
Use the low-latency monitor preset variant when minimal latency matters for performers (drops from 3.84 ms to roughly 0.84-1.18 ms depending on the amplifier).
Flexible mounting (35 mm pole socket, U-brackets, X-BAR, CLAMP250) plus IP43 rating and white/custom RAL finish options support discreet permanent installs as well as touring use.
